greeting: Hello! I'm your DiaSense Assistant. How can I help you today?
Hi! I can help with diabetes information, healthy lifestyle tips, prediction guidance, doctor booking, and account support.
Hey there! Ask me about diabetes, blood sugar, diet, exercise, appointments, or prediction.
bot_identity: I'm DiaSense Assistant, a chatbot created to provide diabetes education and help you use the DiaSense system.
I'm your DiaSense Assistant. I answer common diabetes questions and help you use features like prediction, appointments, and login.
I am a virtual assistant for the DiaSense project. I provide general diabetes information and app guidance.
thanks: Happy to help! Let me know if you have another question.
goodbye: Goodbye! Take care and stay healthy.
Bye! Feel free to come back anytime.
See you later. Wishing you good health.
fallback: Sorry, I didn't understand that. You can ask me about diabetes symptoms, blood sugar, diet, exercise, prediction, appointments, or login help.

diabetes_definition: Diabetes is a condition where blood sugar levels stay too high because the body cannot produce enough insulin or cannot use insulin effectively.
Diabetes is a metabolic condition that affects how the body regulates blood glucose.
Diabetes occurs when insulin production or insulin function is not enough to control blood sugar properly.
diabetes_symptoms: Common symptoms include increased thirst, frequent urination, fatigue, blurred vision, slow healing wounds, and unexplained weight changes.
Diabetes symptoms may include thirst, fatigue, frequent urination, blurry vision, and slow healing cuts.
Signs of diabetes can include excessive thirst, hunger, tiredness, and frequent urination.
diabetes_prevention: Diabetes prevention includes healthy eating, regular exercise, maintaining a healthy weight, reducing sugary foods, and regular health checkups.
Healthy lifestyle habits such as balanced diet, physical activity, and weight management can reduce diabetes risk.
Preventing diabetes often focuses on good nutrition, regular exercise, and maintaining a healthy weight.
diet_guidance: A diabetes-friendly diet includes vegetables, whole grains, lean proteins, healthy fats, and controlled carbohydrate portions.
Healthy eating for diabetes focuses on balanced meals, fiber-rich foods, and limiting sugary drinks and processed foods.
Choose vegetables, whole foods, lean protein, and healthy fats while limiting high sugar foods.
exercise_guidance: Regular exercise such as walking, cycling, or light workouts can help control blood sugar and improve overall health.
Physical activity supports healthy blood sugar levels and helps with weight management.
Exercise like walking or stretching can help reduce diabetes risk and improve energy levels.
blood_sugar_info: Blood sugar refers to the level of glucose in your blood. Monitoring it helps manage diabetes risk.
The A1C test shows your average blood sugar level over the past 2 to 3 months.
Blood sugar testing helps track glucose levels and manage diabetes more effectively.
complications_info: Diabetes can lead to complications if not managed properly, including eye problems, kidney disease, nerve damage, and heart disease.
Long-term uncontrolled diabetes may affect the eyes, kidneys, nerves, heart, and feet.
Proper diabetes management can reduce the risk of serious complications.
prediction_help: To use diabetes prediction, enter your health values such as glucose, BMI, age, and blood pressure, then click Predict.
The prediction tool estimates diabetes risk based on the health values you provide.
Fill in the required health fields correctly and submit to get your diabetes risk prediction.
doctor_booking: To book a doctor, open the Doctors page, select a doctor, choose a date and time slot, and confirm the appointment.
You can book a doctor by selecting an available doctor and choosing a suitable appointment time.
Doctor booking usually requires choosing a doctor, selecting a date, and confirming the appointment.
appointment_help: You can manage appointments from the appointments page where you can view, update, or cancel bookings.
Appointment help includes checking appointment details, booking new visits, or cancelling existing appointments.
To manage appointments, open your appointments section and choose the action you need.
login_help: If you cannot login, check your email and password carefully and make sure your account is registered.
Login issues may happen due to incorrect credentials or typing mistakes.
If login fails, verify your email, password, and internet connection, then try again.
